userMessage: Set up CAN FD decode on B1 source CH2 500kbps nominal 2Mbps data phase ISO standard. Set up search on B1 for CAN FD error frames. Set edge trigger on CH2 rising 1.65V. Enable FastFrame 500 frames single sequence. After capture query FastFrame timestamp for all frames, save CH2 waveform as binary and screenshot.

actionsJson.summary: Parsed full flow JSON from assistant output.

params.text: Set up CAN FD decode on Bus1 (CH2), 500kbps nominal, 2Mbps data, ISO standard
Set up search for CAN FD error frames on Bus1
Set edge trigger on CH2 rising at 1.65V
Query FastFrame timestamps for all frames
